resultList.dtldesc: Step into a world of elegance with this exquisite 3 BHK Flat available for sale in M3M Antalya Hills Phase I, Sector 79, Gurgaon With excellent connectivity to major roads and business centers, this flat is your gateway to a life of comfort, convenience, and luxury. Secure your dream home at M3M Antalya Hills Phase I and step into a world of unparalleled comfort and elegance, where every detail is crafted to enhance your living experience.Property Specifications With a scheduled possession date of December 2025, this property is the perfect opportunity to invest in a future-ready home. Spread across a carpet area of 886 sq ft, this flat is situated on the 3rd floor of a low-rise building with only 4 floors, offering an exclusive and peaceful living experience. Moving to the floor plan, there are 3 bedrooms and 3 western bathrooms where 2 bathrooms are attached to the bedrooms, while the other is available for common use. Additionally, there are 2 well-placed balconies where one balcony is attached to the bedroom and another connected to the living area, providing clear views of the surrounding road and ample natural light. It features a well-appointed living-cum-dining area, perfect for hosting gatherings or enjoying cosy family dinners. Furthermore, the kitchen is complete with a piped gas connection, a granite platform, a stainless steel sink, and an attached utility area. Every inch of the flooring is done with premium vitrified tiles, adding a touch of sophistication to the interiors. Moreover, the flat comes unfurnished, allowing you to design and furnish it to your personal taste.Facilities M3M Antalya Hills Phase I offers a range of top-notch facilities such as covered parking space for your vehicles, 24-hour water supply, 100 power backup, a modern lift, security guards, CCTV surveillance, water storage, waste disposal, reserved parking, servicegoods lift, visitor parking, maintenance staff, and a robust 3-tier security system, ensuring complete peace of mind.Additional amenities include a multipurpose court, a well-equipped gymnasium, a large open space, a park, earthquake-resistant construction, rainwater harvesting systems, fire-fighting equipment, a conference room, mini cinema theater, barbeque pit, a guest lobby on each floor, making it an ideal space for both social and family gatherings.Locality M3M Antalya Hills Phase I is located in the heart of Sector 79, Gurgaon, providing exceptional connectivity. The area is surrounded by several reputed schools, well-known hospitals, and shopping centers all within a 1 km radius, ensuring convenience for families. Public transport options, including buses and autos, are readily available, making commuting hassle-free. With banks and ATMs situated just 500 meters away, your financial needs are always within reach.
